channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dangerous item left near brook, 22nd April
item.description:
There is what appears to be the remains of a moped/scooter/bike left near the brook which could cause harm to people and animals.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clyde Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple streetlights are out on All Saints Road, Pittville Circus Road and Pittville Circus. Some of these have been out now for weeks, but the problem seems to be spreading to new locations. The whole area is very dark, which must be very scary for women walking alone. It is in general very dangerous and it is only a matter of time before someone is hurt, either as a result of an accident or crime. PLEASE fix this now., 22nd April
item.description:
Street Lights out: - At least three lights out at the west end of Pittville Circus Road (near Askham Court) - At least four lights out at the north end of All Saints Road - At least four lights out around Pittville Circus and the mini roundabout.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pittville Circus, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 22nd April
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please repair x1 chipped kerb stone 210x100x40mm with concrete fillet (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bend in road sign with max speed 30mph missing for probably a year. This is in addition to the signs on the corner including CHEVRON being destroyed at the weekend 18-19/4/26. The bend warning sign with max speed 30mph in the opposite direction has been missing for about five years. This is a notoriously dangerous bend with at least six cars ending up in the adjoining fields in recent months. There have also been accidents recently on this corner involving a motorcycle and cyclists., 22nd April
item.description:
B4213 Deerhurst Road Turning Bend sign w3w below.warnings.ripen Bend sign w3w alley.doormat.trailers Large sign inc.Chevron w3w ascendant.contrived.ally

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): B4213, Deerhurst, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
